**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the v5.7 extreme cross-domain rhapsody and office building circuit breaker probe. A complete common-sense disaster occurred in the official commercial registry system: classifying it into the highest industrial tier, 'Complete Automobile Manufacturing.' Not only that, its business scope is written with extreme madness: from 'complete automobile final assembly' to 'waste material acquisition,' and then to 'catering management, landscaping, cleaning services, warehousing and transportation.' The probe immediately executed a shattering verification of physical parameters: the company's paid-in capital is a mere 50,000 RMB (even the registered capital is only 5 million), and the insured headcount is only 11 people. The most fatal aspect is its address: 'Room 1925, Block F, Wanda Plaza.' In a single-room office on the 19th floor of Wanda Plaza, using 50,000 RMB to set up a complete automobile assembly line? While also engaging in landscaping and waste material acquisition? This is not just forgery; it is a complete disregard for physical space. The probe stripped away all the nonsense, and combining its company name 'Automotive Technology Services,' forcefully reconstructed its true ecological niche: this is a typical Micro Integrated Outsourcing & Brokerage Agency hiding in a commercial district office building. The boss is a pure 'middleman,' relying on a team of 11 people making phone calls on the 19th floor, taking any job they can get: acting as a sales agent for auto parts, subcontracting a few cleaning or catering management orders, or affiliating a few trucks to act as a logistics intermediary; there is absolutely no physical manufacturing business format.
